title: UVIX × Event Calendar Analysis
subtitle: FOMC / CPI / NFP 发布前 UVIX 上涨相关性 · 复用 +Events 9 特征

methodology.event_features_source: predict_model.build_event_features() — same 9 features as LR Slim+Events
methodology.uvix_source: Yahoo Finance UVIX (1.5x Long VIX Futures ETF)
methodology.pre_window_definition: T-Nd return = UVIX close at T-1 divided by close at T-N trading days before event
